briefs.title: BC Voluntary Self-Exclusion Rules for Gambling Get Formal Legal Terms Starting April 2026
briefs.summary: Starting April 13, 2026, BC's lottery corporation must include specific terms in every voluntary self-exclusion agreement (a written promise by a person to stay out of casinos and online gambling). The agreement must state a fixed duration chosen by the individual, cannot be changed once signed, and bans the person from entering gaming facilities or playing any provincial or online gambling games for the full term.
briefs.action_required: Review your gaming facility's self-exclusion agreement templates and update them to meet the new required terms before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Voluntary Self-Exclusion Regulation takes effect — Gaming Control Act
